parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Wolfgang ', to: [$json.email], subject: 'Welcome to ' + $json.planName + '!', html: '

Hi there,

Thanks for subscribing to ' + $json.planName + '. We are excited to have you on board!

— Wolfgang

' }) }}

meta.description: Receives Stripe webhooks on checkout.session.completed. Parses subscriber email/plan/amount, sends Wolfgang a Telegram alert, and triggers a Resend welcome email. Add your Resend API key before activating.
